title: diamond_apple
description: The Diamond Apple mod is a modification often used in Minecraft that adds a special apple crafted with diamonds instead of gold. When eaten,this apple gives the player powerful effects such as increased health,extra strength,or higher damage resistance.
body: The **Diamond Apple Mod** is a unique Minecraft modification that introduces a powerful new item into the game — an apple crafted using diamonds. When consumed, this special apple grants the player strong advantages such as boosted health, faster regeneration, and improved resistance to damage. Crafting it requires a significant amount of diamonds, making it a rare and valuable item to obtain. This mod enhances gameplay by adding a new layer of strategy and excitement, encouraging players to gather resources and work harder to unlock its powerful benefits.
